message:
fix(ufunc): correct F-order reshape index mapping for source-to-destination conversion

Fix reshape_order to properly compute source indices from destination
C-order positions via Fortran-order flat indexing. The previous logic
had incorrect flat-to-index conversions that caused data transposition
errors. The fix correctly maps each destination C-index through
multi-dimensional coordinates to Fortran-space and back to source
C-indices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
